headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Martin Marietta Materials, Lowers Price Target to $664
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Angel Castillo   maintains Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $702 to $664.
